findings.message: TASK-02 directs using `disabled={!!collDefaults?.field}` for the new taxonomy inputs; this keeps defaulted fields read-only and can fail the core goal that these fields be editable.
The plan has no explicit test task, and acceptance only requires typecheck/lint (lines 230-231). These fixes are behavior/state-driven UI changes; without targeted tests, regression risk stays high.
`Overall-confidence` is `87%`, but the document's own calculation is `85%` (lines 241-245).
